title: Gene Keys Sequence
description: Structural data for one of the three Gene Keys Hologenetic Profile sequences (Activation, Venus, Pearl). Describes the ordered set of spheres and their astronomical derivations. Does not hold individual profile data.

sphere_count.description: Number of spheres in this sequence.

position.description: Position in the sequence, starting from 1.

derivation.description: Astronomical position from which this sphere derives (e.g., 'Personality Sun'). Null until contributed.
